Individual Audio Craft

Sound with atmosphere, impact and identity.

I’m George Creator — a sound engineer, producer, composer and arranger with around 12 years of experience in sound engineering and mastering, building music, SFX and finished audio experiences for songs, trailers, live sets and visual projects.

My work spans retrowave, EDM, electro, pop, rock, metal, punk rock, vocal mixing, cinematic trailers, game audio, foley and restoration-heavy sessions that need both taste and technical control.

Start a projectExplore portfolio
InstagramSoundCloudYouTubeFiverrUpwork
12+ Years in sound engineering and mastering
Multi‑format Studio, live, trailer, game and vocal work
Genre range Retrowave, EDM, pop, rock, metal and more

Hi there. I am a sound engineer, producer and composer. I work as a sound engineer and mastering engineer for about 12 years, and I have been learning music since childhood. A large part of my finished projects is being published gradually over time across my public platforms.

About

Technical depth

Mixing, mastering, arrangement support, vocal production, remixing, remastering and difficult repair-oriented work with noisy or compromised recordings.

Creative direction

Original music composition, trailer sound, game audio, foley and atmospheric world-building for visual concepts and immersive scenes.

Performance context

Live sound experience across private events, hard rock contexts and gospel music, bringing both stage energy and studio precision into one profile.

Services

The original site shows a broad audio practice covering production, live work and post-production. This new structure turns that into clear client-facing service areas.

Mixing, mastering & restoration

Genre-focused mixing for pop, EDM, electro, retrowave, metal, rock and punk rock, plus restoration-style problem solving for damaged or difficult source material.

PopEDMRetrowaveMetalRestoration

SFX, foley & music composing

Full audio creation for trailers, game concepts and visual pieces — from music writing to foley, impact design and final mix-ready delivery.

Game AudioFoleyTrailer SoundSci‑Fi

Arrangements & production support

Arrangement building, song development, vocal support and production refinement that helps a track move from idea stage to finished release-ready form.

ArrangementSong DevelopmentVocal Mixing

Selected works

Mars colonization concept

Full music and sound design for a future-facing 3D virtual 360 degree animation about the colonization of Mars, built to create a deep sci-fi atmosphere.

DUBAI ON MARS | 360° VR

Bear game cinematic trailer

Short-form trailer audio with original music and custom effects for a possible game concept, designed to hit hard in a compact runtime.

Island life VR trailer

Live work

Live audio examples from the original site show that the portfolio is not limited to studio production. The profile includes real event and performance contexts as well.

Live sound handling for private event performance settings built around live piano presence and intimate room balance.

Live gospel music

Live sound support in gospel performance settings, requiring musical sensitivity, vocal space and ensemble control.

Gospel live
Watch

Booking

1. Send the brief

Contact me before ordering with your genre, references, deadline and the kind of help you need — mixing, mastering, arrangement, trailer sound, SFX or a full audio package.

2. Align the scope

We define the task, delivery format, number of files, revision logic and the best platform for the project workflow.

3. Start production

Once the scope is clear, the project moves into active work through direct contact or marketplace booking.
